title: He Built $100B at Google, Then Failed. Now He Runs an $80B+ Company | Snowflake, Sridhar Ramaswamy
summary: Sridhar Ramaswamy, CEO of Snowflake, discusses his career trajectory from building Google's search business to founding the failed Neeva search engine and lessons learned. He shares principles for leading companies into the AI era, emphasizing resilience after failure and the importance of staying close to product development.
writeup: This EO interview features Sridhar Ramaswamy, CEO of Snowflake, tracing a career arc from building Google's search advertising business to founding the search startup Neeva, which failed, and then leading Snowflake. The conversation draws out the lessons behind that trajectory and how they shape leadership in the AI era. Key takeaways center on resilience after failure and on staying close to product development rather than drifting away from it.
